eval_dimensions.name: Session Mode Selection
eval_dimensions.description: The skill detects the correct session mode from context — New workshop (no docs/domain/), Continue (docs/domain/model.md exists), Stress test ("what if we add X?"), Archetype application ("apply archetype"/"feels bloated") — reads the mode's designated reference file, and creates the mode-specific task set.

eval_dimensions.name: Ordered Context Load
eval_dimensions.description: In Continue / Stress-test modes, Step 1 reads the domain docs in the documented order: model.md, decisions.md, calculator.md, stress-tests.md, glossary.md, epics.md, latest workshop, then implementation source and CLAUDE.md.

eval_dimensions.name: 7-Layer Event Storming Order
eval_dimensions.description: Exploration runs the event-storming layers in the documented order: (1) domain events, (2) commands, (3) actors, (4) policies, (5) aggregates, (6) bounded contexts, (7) value objects. Layers are not skipped or reordered.

eval_dimensions.name: Batched Decision Menu
eval_dimensions.description: When input is genuinely needed, the skill batches ALL questions into a single structured AskUserQuestion decision menu — never one question at a time — and otherwise proceeds on reasonable assumptions to minimize interruptions.

eval_dimensions.name: Decision Protection / Explicit Supersession
eval_dimensions.description: Prior decisions in decisions.md are never silently overridden. Contradicting information produces a NEW decision that explicitly supersedes the old one (supersedes: D-NNN), updating the old entry's status to Superseded.

eval_dimensions.name: Solo AI-Cast Facilitation
eval_dimensions.description: The solo default dispatches the persona panel for blind event generation and the devil's advocate before decision capture on structural changes, marks assumptions with [ASSUMPTION], and genericizes proprietary data.

eval_dimensions.name: Quality Checklist Gate
eval_dimensions.description: Before ending a session the quality checklist is verified as the final gate — decisions recorded with IDs, model.md current, workshop record written, and in solo mode no [ASSUMPTION] tags remain in model.md/decisions.md/glossary.md.

evals.name: New workshop mode scaffolds docs
evals.description: With no docs/domain/ present, the skill selects New workshop mode, reads references/document-structure.md, and scaffolds the docs/domain/ structure before exploration.
evals.input: /Dev10x:ddd let's model a new pricing domain

assertions.signal: No docs/domain/ present → New workshop mode; docs/domain/ scaffold is created and references/document-structure.md is read first

evals.name: Continue mode loads context in order
evals.description: With docs/domain/model.md present, the skill selects Continue mode and reads the domain docs in the documented order before proceeding.

assertions.signal: Step 1 reads model.md → decisions.md → calculator.md → stress-tests.md → glossary.md → epics.md → latest workshop in that order before exploring

evals.name: Stress-test question selects stress-test mode
evals.description: A "what if we add X / does Y break" prompt selects Stress test mode and reads references/stress-test-protocol.md.
evals.input: /Dev10x:ddd what breaks if we add multi-currency pricing?

assertions.signal: "what breaks if we add X" → Stress test mode; references/stress-test-protocol.md is read

evals.name: Event storming runs 7 layers in order
evals.description: Exploration proceeds through the seven layers in the documented order without skipping or reordering.

assertions.signal: Layers run in order: events → commands → actors → policies → aggregates → bounded contexts → value objects

evals.name: Questions are batched into one AskUserQuestion menu
evals.description: When the skill needs input it presents a single batched AskUserQuestion decision menu rather than asking one question at a time.
evals.input: /Dev10x:ddd model a new tax domain with several open choices

assertions.signal: Genuine decision points use AskUserQuestion with a single batched menu of options
The skill does NOT ask one question at a time; it proceeds on reasonable assumptions until a batch is warranted

evals.name: Contradictions supersede, never silently override
evals.description: When new information contradicts a prior decision, the skill records a NEW decision that explicitly supersedes it rather than silently changing the old one.

assertions.signal: A contradicting choice creates a new D-NNN with supersedes: D-MMM and marks the old decision Superseded — never a silent override

evals.name: Solo mode dispatches persona panel and devil's advocate
evals.description: In the solo default, the persona panel runs blind event generation and the devil's advocate is dispatched before decision capture on structural changes; assumptions are tagged [ASSUMPTION].

assertions.signal: Solo default: persona panel does blind event generation and devil's advocate is dispatched before structural decision capture; assumptions tagged [ASSUMPTION]

evals.name: Quality checklist is the terminal verification gate
evals.description: Before ending, the skill verifies the quality checklist, including that no [ASSUMPTION] tags remain in solo mode.

assertions.signal: Session end runs the Quality Checklist; decisions recorded with IDs, workshop record written, and no [ASSUMPTION] tags remain in model.md/decisions.md/glossary.md

trigger_evals.description: Queries that should/should-not trigger the ddd skill

should_trigger.rationale: Direct invocation — runs or continues a DDD event-storming workshop

should_trigger.query: let's event storm the payments domain and find the bounded contexts
should_trigger.rationale: Domain exploration crossing bounded-context boundaries — the core use case

should_trigger.query: what breaks in the architecture if we add goods pricing?
should_trigger.rationale: Architecture stress test against a future scenario

should_not_trigger.query: scope this ticket in the known invoicing context
should_not_trigger.rationale: Single well-defined ticket in a known context — use Dev10x:ticket-scope

should_not_trigger.query: write the ADR for the already-decided money type
should_not_trigger.rationale: ADR for an already-decided topic — use the write-adr flow

should_not_trigger.query: implement the tax calculator in the existing pricing module
should_not_trigger.rationale: Pure implementation with no open domain questions
